description: This video explains yield farming, a popular DeFi service that automates and optimizes yield from various financial products. It discusses the traditional role of Ethereum in DeFi and mentions the emergence of other blockchains with active DeFi ecosystems.
topic_summary: Yield farming is a DeFi service that enhances returns from reward pools and staking. Ethereum is a key player in this space, but other blockchains are also developing robust DeFi ecosystems. [t=1:20] [t=20:24]
